tasks.label: Check Dotfiles Setup
args: PARENT=$(cd "${workspaceFolder}/.." && pwd); if [ ! -d "$PARENT/dotfiles" ]; then echo ''; echo '⚠️  MISSING: dotfiles not found'; echo "    Expected at: $PARENT/dotfiles"; echo ''; echo '📋 To fix, run in terminal:'; echo ''; echo "  cd $PARENT"; echo '  git clone https://github.com/nic2045/dotfiles.git'; echo '  cd dotfiles'; echo '  bash setup.sh'; echo ''; exit 1; else echo '✓ Dotfiles found'; fi
